scripts.push-test-images: adb shell mkdir -p /sdcard/Pictures/test_images_from_internet && adb push "../test_images_from_internet/early_blight_1.jpg" /sdcard/Pictures/test_images_from_internet/ && adb push "../test_images_from_internet/late_blight_1.jpg" /sdcard/Pictures/test_images_from_internet/ && adb shell am broadcast -a android.intent.action.MEDIA_SCANNER_SCAN_FILE -d file:///sdcard/Pictures/test_images_from_internet/early_blight_1.jpg && adb shell am broadcast -a android.intent.action.MEDIA_SCANNER_SCAN_FILE -d file:///sdcard/Pictures/test_images_from_internet/late_blight_1.jpg
scripts.push-late-blight-images: adb shell mkdir -p /sdcard/Pictures/late_blight && adb push android/app/src/main/assets/late_blight/late_blight_1.jpg /sdcard/Pictures/late_blight/ && adb push android/app/src/main/assets/late_blight/late_blight_2.jpg /sdcard/Pictures/late_blight/ && adb push android/app/src/main/assets/late_blight/late_blight_3.jpg /sdcard/Pictures/late_blight/ && adb push android/app/src/main/assets/late_blight/late_blight_4.jpg /sdcard/Pictures/late_blight/ && adb push android/app/src/main/assets/late_blight/late_blight_5.jpg /sdcard/Pictures/late_blight/ && adb shell am broadcast -a android.intent.action.MEDIA_SCANNER_SCAN_FILE -d file:///sdcard/Pictures/late_blight/late_blight_1.jpg && adb shell am broadcast -a android.intent.action.MEDIA_SCANNER_SCAN_FILE -d file:///sdcard/Pictures/late_blight/late_blight_2.jpg && adb shell am broadcast -a android.intent.action.MEDIA_SCANNER_SCAN_FILE -d file:///sdcard/Pictures/late_blight/late_blight_3.jpg && adb shell am broadcast -a android.intent.action.MEDIA_SCANNER_SCAN_FILE -d file:///sdcard/Pictures/late_blight/late_blight_4.jpg && adb shell am broadcast -a android.intent.action.MEDIA_SCANNER_SCAN_FILE -d file:///sdcard/Pictures/late_blight/late_blight_5.jpg
scripts.bundle-ios: set NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider && npx react-native bundle --entry-file index.js --platform ios --dev false --bundle-output ios/main.jsbundle
